name: Carnival in Venice
description: One of the oldest recorded carnivals, defined by mysterious hand-decorated masks, concerts, and dancing in plazas.

name: Carnival in Rio de Janeiro
description: A massive celebration known for its jewel-studded headdresses, vibrant costumes, and rhythmic Samba music.

name: Carnival in Sao Paulo
description: Features huge, organized parades with vibrant costumes and diverse Samba cultures.

name: Gran Canaria Carnival
description: A historic festival famous for its drag queen gala, the Cabalgata parade, and the symbolic funeral of the sardine.

name: Tenerife Carnival
description: A spectacular month-long celebration featuring elaborate sequined costumes, floats, and masked dances with themes like The Future.

name: La Palma Carnival
description: Distinctive for the Indios parade where participants dress in white and talcum powder fills the air to Caribbean rhythms.

name: Avilés Carnival
description: A smaller carnival in northern Spain featuring music, dance, costumes, and a funeral for the sardine.

name: Cadiz Carnival
description: Well known for its social satire, vocal ensembles, and gastronomic events involving pastries, sea urchins, and oysters.

name: Sitges Carnival
description: A spirited seaside festival with a large gay community presence, drag queens, and all-night parties.
